query:
SELECT 
  d.id as demandId,
  c.name as clientName,
  d.location,
  d.date,
  DATE_FORMAT(d.date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as dateFormatted,
  d.startTime,
  d.endTime,
  d.requiredWorkers
FROM demands d
JOIN clients c ON d.clientId = c.id
WHERE c.name LIKE '%米窩%'
ORDER BY d.date DESC
LIMIT 5;
